Package i5.cb.graph

Class GECommand

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.graph.GECommand
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.event.ActionListener, java.util.EventListener

    public class GECommand
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.awt.event.ActionListener
    ActionListener for all possible actions that can be chosen in the menuBar
    Since:
    1.0
    See Also:
    ActionListener

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      GECommand​()
      For Checkboxes we have a special constructor, as we need to acces the JCheckBoxMenuItem(get the state) when it is selected.
      GECommand​(GraphEditor ge, int id)
      This constructor is used by the JMenuItems in GraphMenuBar

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods

      void actionPerformed​(java.awt.event.ActionEvent e)
      Depending on the invokers id this method executes the correct action.

    • Constructor Detail

      • GECommand

        public GECommand​(GraphEditor ge,
                 int id)
        This constructor is used by the JMenuItems in GraphMenuBar
        Parameters:
        ge - the GraphEditor owning the GraphMenuBar
        id - by the id we know which action to perform

      • GECommand

        public GECommand​()
        For Checkboxes we have a special constructor, as we need to acces the JCheckBoxMenuItem(get the state) when it is selected. -param ge the GraphEditor owning the GraphMenuBar -param item a JCheckBoxMenuItem -param id by the id we know which action to perform

    • Method Detail

      • actionPerformed

        public void actionPerformed​(java.awt.event.ActionEvent e)
        Depending on the invokers id this method executes the correct action. Not all ids are handled yet.
        Specified by:
        actionPerformed in interface java.awt.event.ActionListener
        Parameters:
        e - an ActionEvent
